# Akshat Sinha

> Senior Site Reliability Engineer with 6+ years building large-scale distributed infrastructure. MS Computer Science, University of Wisconsin–Madison (GPA 4.0). Security researcher with CVE discoveries in high-profile open source AI projects.

## Work

- Senior Software Engineer, SRE at Rubrik (Aug 2023–Present, Palo Alto CA) — Incident Commander, Observability as Code, auto-remediation, LLM tooling
- Site Reliability Engineer at TikTok USDS (Dec 2022–Aug 2023, Mountain View CA) — Video Architecture Team
- Production Engineer Intern at Meta (May–Aug 2022, Menlo Park CA) — Payments Team
- Site Reliability Engineer at Media.Net/Directi (Jun 2018–Dec 2020, Mumbai India) — Ads Serving Team

## Education

- MS, Computer Science — University of Wisconsin–Madison (2021–2023), CS Departmental Scholarship, GPA 4.0/4.0
- BTech, Computer Science — IIIT Delhi (2014–2018), GPA 8.76/10.0

## Publications

- "Using Trātṛ to Tame Adversarial Synchronization" — USENIX Security 2022
- "Where The Light Gets In: Analyzing Web Censorship Mechanisms in India" — IMC 2018
- "Deep Neural Networks for Segmentation of Basal Ganglia Sub-Structures in Brain MR Images" — ICVGIP 2016

## Security Research (CVE Discoveries)

- CVE-2026-33309 (Critical, 10.0) — Arbitrary file write via path traversal in Langflow v2 file upload API, enabling RCE
- CVE-2026-33484 (High, 7.5) — Unauthenticated IDOR on image download endpoint in Langflow
- CVE-2026-28786 (Moderate, 4.3) — Path traversal in Open WebUI audio transcription endpoint

## Security Research (CVE Remediation Reviews)

- CVE-2026-33150 (High, 7.8) — Use-after-free in libfuse io_uring subsystem
- CVE-2026-33179 (Moderate, 5.5) — NULL pointer dereference in libfuse io_uring queue initialization

## Service

- Artifact Evaluation Committee Reviewer — OOPSLA 2026
- Artifact Evaluation Committee Reviewer — MLSys 2026
